task_completion.description: Set the first audio track to unity gain and ensure it is unmuted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour mixer or editor window, the fader for the first audio track is positioned at or very close to 0 dB (unity gain), and the 'M' (Mute) button is not engaged/lit.
A snapshot named 'Full_Mix' is visible in the Snapshots list/tab or a 'Save Snapshot' dialog is shown with this exact name.

task_completion.description: Set the first audio track to approximately -12 dB and ensure it is unmuted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fader for the first audio track is lowered to approximately the -12 dB mark on the meter scale, and the 'M' (Mute) button is not engaged.
A snapshot named 'Reduced_Mix' is visible in the Snapshots list/tab or a 'Save Snapshot' dialog is shown with this exact name.
The 'M' (Mute) button on the first audio track is engaged (usually lit up or colored), OR the fader is pulled all the way down to the bottom (<= -60 dB).
A snapshot named 'Muted_Track' is visible in the Snapshots list/tab or a 'Save Snapshot' dialog is shown with this exact name.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour graphical user interface to adjust levels and create snapshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Ardour application windows, mixer strips, and snapshot dialogs, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Snapshots were created using the application's built-in snapshot functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The snapshots appear in Ardour's native 'Snapshots' list/sidebar, rather than the agent just renaming files in a file manager.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts to bypass manual GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open running Python or bash scripts to modify the Ardour session files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on an Ardour project. Unity gain for 'Full_Mix' is acceptable if the fader is between -3.0 dB and 3.0 dB. The 'Reduced_Mix' fader level is acceptable between -15.0 dB and -9.0 dB. The 'Muted_Track' requires the track to be explicitly muted (Mute button engaged) or the fader dropped to <= -60.0 dB. The exact required snapshot names are 'Full_Mix', 'Reduced_Mix', and 'Muted_Track'.
